series_metadata.series_title: Correspondence from and to the National Credit Union Administration
series_metadata.series_description: Files contain any correspondence from and to, or relating to the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility two (2) years from date of correspondence ; Electronic: electronic files two (2) years from date of correspondence
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
